channel.title: MarkSchofield on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in MarkSchofield on Nature Works

item.title: Wildlife Gardening Forum evening
item.description:
An Evening for Wildlife Gardeners online, with Dave Goulson, Thurs 12th Jan 2023 7.30-9.00PM

Notes from this evening, in a very notish format! I make no apologies. http://localhost:1313/blog/230112-wildlife-gardening-forum/
